title: Tax-free savings account related forms and publications - Canada.ca
content:
## Tax-free savings account related forms and publications
Forms Information circulars Income tax folios
- RC236, Application for a Tax-Free Savings Account Identification Number
- T3F, Investments Prescribed to be Qualified Information Return
- T1024, Election to Deem a Proportional Holding in a Qualified Trust/Corporate Property

## Information Circulars
- IC18-1, Tax-Free Savings Accounts
- S3-F10-C1, Qualified Investments – RRSPs, RESPs, RRIFs, RDSPs, FHSAs and TFSAs
- S3-F10-C2, Prohibited Investments – RRSPs, RESPs, RRIFs, RDSPs, FHSAs and TFSAs
- S3-F10-C3, Advantages – RRSPs, RESPs, RRIFs, RDSPs, FHSAs and TFSAs

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
